task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for changing working time or calendar settings (e.g., 'Change Working Time') is visible in the project management application.
The 'Standard' calendar is selected in the dropdown or list within the calendar configuration dialog.

task_completion.description: Set Saturday as a working day
task_completion.visual_evidence: Saturday is selected in the calendar view, and the option to set it as a working day (e.g., 'Non-default working time') is enabled.

task_completion.description: Set Saturday's working hours to 08:00-12:00 and 13:00-17:00
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time input fields for the selected Saturday show the exact ranges '08:00' to '12:00' and '13:00' to '17:00'.

task_completion.description: Ensure Sunday remains a non-working day
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sunday is selected or visually indicated as a non-working day (e.g., grayed out, or 'Non-working time' option is active).

task_completion.description: Save the project as an XML file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog is visible showing the directory '/home/ga/Projects', the filename 'crunch_schedule.xml', and the file type set to XML.

integrity.description: The agent used the project management software GUI to modify the calendar.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual project management application's calendar dialogs, not terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually edit the XML file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) being used to manually write or modify the XML tags.

integrity.description: The save operation was performed through the application's native dialog.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialog belongs to the project management application and is not a mock window or terminal prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying the 'Standard' base calendar. Saturday must be set as a working day with hours 08:00-12:00 and 13:00-17:00. Sunday must remain a non-working day. The file must be saved as an MSPDI XML to '/home/ga/Projects/crunch_schedule.xml'.
